# remscontent_form (Data Source)

Form data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remscontent_form" "example" {
  internal_name = "A0001 Form"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `internal_name` (String) Internal name for the form, visible to administrators only.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The form ID
